name: devkit-ai
description: Generate AI assistant configuration files (skills, hooks, agents, TASK.md) for any software project across Claude Code, Copilot, Gemini, and Cursor.

enable_planner.description: Generate planner agent for target project (default: yes)

enable_implementer.description: Generate implementer agent for target project (default: yes)

enable_reviewer.description: Generate reviewer agent for target project (default: yes)

enable_debugger.description: Generate debugger agent for target project (default: yes)
